title: Netherite But Cheaper
description: Doesn't change much at all other then some recipes to make netherite ever so slightly cheaper
body:
Reduces the amount of gold and netherite scrap required for an ingot and lets you get more out of an ancient debris if used in a stonecutter.

Now with an upgrade template recipe for 1.20+
